attr.title: Super Blood Hockey
attr.desc: Relive the golden age of arcade sports gaming with Super Blood Hockey — a violent homage to classic 8-bit and 16-bit ice hockey games. Create and manage your team in a dystopic world of no-rules, fast-paced, arcade-style ice hockey action. Adjust training regimens, control diets, administer black market pharmaceuticals, and provide healthcare (or not) to a ragtag team of convicts at the mercy of your underhanded tactics. Paint the ice with the blood of your friends in 4-player local multiplayer, take on the world in global tournaments, or conquer challenge modes with absurd scenarios like 12 vs 12 Mega Rumble. Features an original chiptune soundtrack by Shawn Daley.
attr.inst:
You must provide the Steam data files for Super Blood Hockey.
https://store.steampowered.com/app/532190

Supports both Windows and Linux versions.
Place all game files into the `superbloodhockey/gamedata` folder.

There is a patch to add support for displays of 640x480,
but this will only work on version 1.5.4, otherwise the game
has a minimum supported resolution of 1024x768.
